GetFinding.description: Grants permission to get a finding

GetResource.description: Grants permission to get a resource

ListAccountSummaries.description: Grants permission to list account summaries for an account

ListInsights.description: Grants permission to list insights about the latest network security scan

ListRemediations.description: Grants permission to list remediations for a finding

UpdateFinding.description: Grants permission to update the status of a finding
